title: Question: struct verilator tag for xml output
body: --- Author Name: **Rui Terra** Original Redmine Message: 2414 from https://www.veripool.org --- How can we do a tag to the type of a struct? I tried this: ``` package `pkg; typedef struct packed { logic v0; // verilator tag t0_0 logic [31:0] d0; // verilator tag t0_1 } t0; typedef struct packed { logic v1; // verilator tag t1_0 logic [31:0] d1; // verilator tag t1_1 } t1; // verilator tag t1_2 endpackage : `pkg module m import `pkg::*; ( input var logic i_clk , // verilator tag test0 input var logic i_rst_n , // verilator tag test1 input var t0 i_t0 , // verilator tag test2 input var t1 i_t1 ); // verilator tag test3 endmodule ``` But the results are not what I expected: ``` ``` For struct t1 the tag of the struct type was used as the field d1 instead. I was expecting to see the tag like this: ``` ```
